title: Footstep and Motion Planning in Semi-Unstructured Environments Using Randomized Possibility Graphs
authors: Grey, Michael, Aaron Ames, and C. Karen Liu
fullCitation: Grey, Michael, Aaron Ames, and C. Karen Liu.  “Footstep and Motion Planning in Semi-Unstructured Environments Using Randomized Possibility Graphs” ,  IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2017 , May 2017.
